rationale: An elementary disjunction is a finite disjunction of literals, so def:literal is the load-bearing constituent and was missing (the statement hyperrefs def:literal explicitly).
notes: Duplication flag: the statement itself says 'it is a clause', and def:clause is glossed as 'a finite list of literal-level alternatives' -- i.e. elementary-disjunction and def:clause are the same concept (disjunction of literals). Strong dedup candidate; I added def:literal (the building block) rather than a circular edge to def:clause, but the reviewer should reconcile the two synonymous nodes.
